task_objective: Industrial Line Art to Relief Pattern Design & 9-View 3x3 - Map Figure 2 patterns onto Figure 1 product, view_1 precise replica, views 2-9 creative variations,  material, original product structure FULLY PRESERVED

input_assets.product_reference: Figure 1 Industrial Line Art - Outer frame dimensions, shape, outline, structural features - LOCKED
input_assets.pattern_inspiration: Figure 2 Inspiration Image - Decorative patterns, surface textures, artistic motifs — pattern structure only, discard color

workflow.step_1: Auto-detect Figure 1 product structure + extract Figure 2 pattern structure (discard color)
workflow.step_2: View_1 (FIXED): 1:1 replica of Figure 2 pattern within designated_area. Views 2-9 (CREATIVE): free designs inspired by Figure 2 aesthetic DNA within designated_area
workflow.step_3: Verify Figure 1 product specs/dimensions/shape unchanged, apply  material + designated_text, assemble 9-view 3x3 grid

outputs.view_1: Precise Replica - 1:1 replica of Figure 2 pattern, self-adapted to Figure 1 product within designated_area,
outputs.view_2: Creative Variation 02 - Inspired by Figure 2 aesthetic DNA, self-adapted within designated_area,
outputs.view_3: Creative Variation 03 - Inspired by Figure 2 aesthetic DNA, self-adapted within designated_area,
outputs.view_4: Creative Variation 04 - Inspired by Figure 2 aesthetic DNA, self-adapted within designated_area,
outputs.view_5: Creative Variation 05 - Inspired by Figure 2 aesthetic DNA, self-adapted within designated_area,
outputs.view_6: Creative Variation 06 - Inspired by Figure 2 aesthetic DNA, self-adapted within designated_area,
outputs.view_7: Creative Variation 07 - Inspired by Figure 2 aesthetic DNA, self-adapted within designated_area,
outputs.view_8: Creative Variation 08 - Inspired by Figure 2 aesthetic DNA, self-adapted within designated_area,
outputs.view_9: Creative Variation 09 - Inspired by Figure 2 aesthetic DNA, self-adapted within designated_area,

output_requirements: PRODUCT LOCK: Outer frame dimensions and shape identical to Figure 1 — zero deviation across all 9 views
PATTERN SELF-ADAPT: Patterns from Figure 2 automatically wrap/fill/scale to fit within designated_area
VIEW_1 FIXED: Strict 1:1 replica of Figure 2 pattern; VIEWS 2-9 CREATIVE: free designs sharing Figure 2 aesthetic DNA
DESIGNATED AREA: Pattern application confined to specified product surface area only
DESIGNATED TEXT: specified text in soft cute cartoon font, auto-scaled, no overflow,elegant typography matching framework
MATERIAL: Brushed matte base + mirror-polished relief, monochrome  metallic tones — zero color saturation
No text/labels/watermarks except designated_text; Premium 3x3, macro front view
